name: Workspace sidebar – Tags navigation
uri: n/a — client-side section switch; sets activeSection = 'tags' in App state
notes: The Tags nav item calls onNavigate('tags'), which sets App.state.activeSection = 'tags'. App.jsx renders DocumentGrid unconditionally regardless of activeSection — no separate tags view or route is mounted.
Sidebar is a stateless functional component; it holds no Redux connection and receives activeSection and onNavigate purely as props from App (class component).
Header.jsx provides duplicate navigation for Documents, Upload, and Search but deliberately omits Tags, making this sidebar item the only entry point for the tags section concept.

The inline tag editor modal lives in DocumentGrid (handleOpenTagEditor / renderTagEditor), not in this sidebar item — opening that modal is triggered per-document from DocumentGrid, not from this nav click.
